name: four-dx-coach
description: Multi-scope coach for the 4 Disciplines of Execution — Socratic coach + single-artifact audit modes.

interface.shortDescription: Coach for the 4 Disciplines of Execution — Socratic coaching + single-artifact audits
interface.longDescription: Use four-dx-coach to apply the 4 Disciplines of Execution: WIG formulation and cascade (D1), lead measures (D2), scoreboard (D3), and cadence of accountability (D4) — plus meta skills for strategy / whirlwind triage, XPS evaluation, team-leader onboarding, and momentum rescue. Runs as a Socratic coach that draws answers out of you, or as a single-artifact audit of an existing WIG, scoreboard, or cadence.
defaultPrompt: Help me formulate a WIG for my team.
Coach me through setting lead measures.
